name: China Leon Inspection Holding Limited
summary: China Leon Inspection Holding Limited, an investment holding company, provides coal and coke testing and inspection services in the People's Republic of China, Singapore, and internationally. The company offers testing, inspection, and advisory services for coal and minerals; surveying services to determine or verify the coal quantity; witnessing and ancillary services to detect dishonesty or abnormality in the testing and transportation of coal and ensure the contractual compliance of the weight of coal carried on rail, truck or conveying belt, or shipping conditions of the cargo. It also provides standard and quality control technical services; inspection and testing of commodities; inspection, testing, appraisal, and inspection technology development services; professional technique services; software development and technique services; computers and equipment; scientific research, technique, and business services; product quality control, inspection, evaluation, supervision, testing, and relevant technique services; and vector biological control technology, technological development, and consulting services, as well as wholesale and retails chemical products. In addition, the company engages in the solar and wind electricity power business. China Leon Inspection Holding Limited was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
